title: Star Wars Reunion II
content:
{{Top|real|title=''Star Wars'' Reunion II}}
[[File:ReunionII.jpg|thumb|right|250px|''Star Wars'' Reunion II logo]]
'''Star Wars Reunion II''' was held at [[Wikipedia:Le Grand Rex|Le Grand Rex]], the famous theatre of [[Wikipedia:Paris|Paris]], [[October 27]] through [[October 28]], [[2007]], almost thirty years after the first French release of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].

{{Stub}}

==Status==
On [[May 3]], [[2007]], [[StarWars.com]] posted [http://www.starwars.com/community/event/fanclub/news20070503.html an official announcement] regarding ''Star Wars'' Reunion II.

==Events==
===''Star Wars'' six-film marathon===
The six films of ''Star Wars'' where screened in a two-day marathon, all in French.

===''Star Wars'' celebrities===
*[[Rick McCallum]]
*[[Anthony Daniels]]
*[[Robert Watts]]
*[[Lorne Peterson]]
*[[Stephen J. Sansweet]]
*[[Garrick Hagon]]
*[[Richard LeParmentier]]
*[[Orli Shoshan]]
*[[Dan Madsen]]
*[[Doug Wheatley]]
*[[Roger Carel]] - French voice of [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]
*[[Bruno Choël]] - French voice of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*[[Bernard Dhéran]] - French voice of [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]
*[[Francis Lax]] - French voice of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]
*[[Jean Lescot]] - French voice of [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]
